zh-CN.title: VSCode
zh-CN.description: 精选 VSCode 扩展与工作流优化，覆盖格式化、Markdown、图标与 JSON 排序等。
zh-CN.content:
VSCode

VSCode 这个工具就不用多介绍了, 用了这么多年在日常开发中, 所这里指推荐几个不错的 VSCode 插件, 有兴趣的可以下载来使用下.

Beautify

Beautify code in place for VS Code

代码颜色显示效果

Beautify javascript, JSON, CSS, Sass, and HTML in Visual Studio Code.

Code Spell Checker

Spelling checker for source code

写代码的时候, 不小心写错单词, 这个会自动出现警告, 帮助纠正错误.

Code Spell Checker

A basic spell checker that works well with camelCase code.

The goal of this spell checker is to help catch common spelling errors while keeping the number of false positives low.

English word hint

English word autocompletion for Visual Studio Code

写代码的时候, 不小心写错单词, 这个会自动出现警告, 帮助纠正错误.

English word hint

markdownlint

Markdown linting and style checking for Visual Studio Code

非常简单的MD工具, 右侧预览效果

markdownlint

Material Icon Theme

Material Design Icons for Visual Studio Code

文件icon, 美化效果

Material Icon Theme

Prettier

Prettier Formatter for Visual Studio Code

代码格式化

Prettier

shell-format

shellscript、Dockerfile、properties、gitignore、dotenv、hosts、jvmoptions… DocumentFormat

文件格式化

shell-format

Sort JSON objects

Sorts the keys within JSON objects

进场进行文件对比, 网络数据, sort 可以很快排序不同文件的顺序, 做diff 很直观

Sort JSON objects

en.title: VSCode
en.description: This collection features carefully selected VSCode extensions and workflow optimizations, covering formatting, Markdown, icon and JSON sorting, and more.
en.content:
VSCode

VSCode needs little introduction; I've used it for many years in my daily development. Here are a few recommended VSCode plugins that you can download and try if you're interested.

Beautify

Beautify code in place for VS Code

Code color display effect

Beautify javascript, JSON, CSS, Sass, and HTML in Visual Studio Code.

Code Spell Checker

Spelling checker for source code

When writing code, if you accidentally misspell a word, this will automatically generate a warning to help correct the error.

Code Spell Checker

A basic spell checker that works well with camelCase code.

The goal of this spell checker is to help catch common spelling errors while keeping the number of false positives low.

English word hint

English word autocompletion for Visual Studio Code

When writing code, if you accidentally misspell a word, this will automatically generate a warning to help correct the error.

English word hint

markdownlint

Markdown linting and style checking for Visual Studio Code

A very simple Material Design (MD) tool; preview on the right.

markdownlint

Material Icon Theme

Material Design Icons for Visual Studio Code

File icon, beautification effects

Material Icon Theme

Prettier

Prettier Formatter for Visual Studio Code

Code Formatting

Prettier

shell-format

shellscript、Dockerfile、properties、gitignore、dotenv、hosts、jvmoptions… DocumentFormat

File formatting

shell-format

Sort JSON objects

Sorts the keys within JSON objects

When comparing files, including network data, the `sort` function can quickly sort the different files, making diffing very intuitive.

Sort JSON objects
